title: hymenocallis maritima
intro: Hymenocallis maritima, also known as the sea island spider lily or coastal spider lily, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the lily family. It is native to the southeastern United States and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as treating respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as reducing fever and relieving pain. Herbal preparations of Hymenocallis maritima can be made by infusing the plant's roots and flowers in water or oil, and can be used to create teas, tinctures, and salves for various health applications.
